title: pimelea humilis
intro: Pimelea humilis, also known as low pimelea, is a flowering plant species native to Australia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Pimelea humilis include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce inflammation, and exhibit potential antiviral properties. Pimelea humilis can be prepared into herbal remedies, such as teas, infusions, and topical creams, but its use should be approached with caution due to potential toxicity and interactions with other medications.
